title: Fix false positives in cursor-based audit compliance reads
Align fab_update_registry priority input with agents.meta schema
Stop MCP transport events from breaking ledger-append dedupe
Dispose HTTP cache watchers on server shutdown
Exposed rc6 gate is stale against current hook/config files
description: The root package still exposes `pnpm rc6:gate`, but the gate re-runs a stale rc5 anchor and checks current files against outdated assumptions. With build/tests skipped, it fails on rc5 legacy checks, missing Cursor SessionStart/PreToolUse slots, and a deleted `packages/cli/src/commands/hooks.ts` path before it can provide a useful release signal. This makes the named gate misleading and likely to be bypassed rather than trusted.
fix_direction: Either retire rc5:gate/rc6:gate from package.json, or update rc6 checks to current hook config ownership and command files, then add a lightweight test/CI assertion that exposed gate scripts execute successfully with FABRIC_GATE_SKIP_BUILD=1 and FABRIC_GATE_SKIP_TESTS=1.

context.notes: Discovered by prompt inconsistency sweep DBP-20260609-023700

issue_history.note: Discovered by prompt inconsistency sweep DBP-20260609-023700
Closed: rc5/rc6 (and rc2-rc4) coverage-gate scripts retired; superseded by release-rc skill.

resolution: Retired the per-rc coverage-gate pattern: deleted scripts/rc2..rc6-coverage-gate.mjs (all 5), removed rc5:gate + rc6:gate from root package.json scripts, un-pinned rc6:gate from scripts/test-strategy-gate.mjs required-scripts list, and updated docs/TESTING.md (Commands list + Scenario Matrix Release-drift-gate row now point to the release-rc skill). The per-rc gate pattern died at rc6 and was superseded by the release-rc skill; matches the issue fix_direction. Migrate-before-delete node sweep (KT-PIT-0035) confirmed no live references remained (only .workflow/ historical artifacts, which do not count). pnpm test:strategy PASS and pnpm lint (knip --strict) clean post-change.

Fixed on main 99077998: cli-surface snapshot includes doctor --probe. CI green after snapshot update.

summary: quoteRelevancePath escapes backslash/quote/control chars before YAML scalar wrap (extract-knowledge.ts).

extractKnowledge secret scan includes recent_paths, tech_stack, impact alongside evidence_paths/tags/text fields.

title: [correctness] readLedger full-file→256KB tail breaks behavior-preserving split
description: ledger-scan.readLedger now calls eventReader.readRecentEvents (256KB tail) instead of main-branch full events.jsonl read + partial-tail drop. Stop-hook archive/backlog/import/maintenance signals silently lose older ledger events on large ledgers.
fix_direction: Restore full-file readLedger semantics in ledger-scan (or explicit full-read API used by fabric-hint); keep tail helper only for intentional bounded readers.

context.suggested_fix: Port main-branch full readFileSync + trailing-newline pop into ledger-scan.readLedger

title: [security] transcript_path unsandboxed arbitrary file read in summarizeTranscript
description: transcript-summary.summarizeTranscript reads stdin transcript_path with no root/realpath allowlist; content can flow to digests/events.
fix_direction: Allowlist absolute paths under known client transcript roots; realpath prefix check; size/suffix limits.

context.suggested_fix: Sandbox path before readFileSync
context.notes: Pre-existing risk relocated with extract; still high

title: [correctness] Archive value-gate uses sessionAnchorTs instead of sessionArchiveWatermark
description: Never-archived session: sessionAnchorTs=first activity ts; isHighValueArchiveCandidate uses strict e.ts>wm so first-activity-ts high-value events are excluded. countBacklogSessions correctly uses sessionArchiveWatermark(null→0).
fix_direction: Use sessionArchiveWatermark(events, sid) for value-gate; keep sessionAnchorTs for mutation counting only.

context.suggested_fix: Use sessionArchiveWatermark(events, sid) for value-gate; keep sessionAnchorTs for mutation counting only.
context.notes: In-session archive nudge can stay quiet despite edit threshold + high-value first event.

resolution: fixed: archive value-gate uses sessionArchiveWatermark (null→0), not sessionAnchorTs. Evidence: verification-fixloop + review COR-010 RESOLVED; fabric-hint ISS-043 tests.

title: [security] FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS can fully disable ISS-041 sandbox
description: 生产路径无条件信任 FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS。未要求绝对路径、未拒绝 '/'。本地复现：FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS='/' 时任意绝对 .jsonl 可读出 user_messages。
fix_direction: 仅 NODE_ENV=test / FABRIC_TEST=1 启用 seam；否则忽略 env。启用时强制 isAbsolute 且拒绝 filesystem root。

context.suggested_fix: 仅 NODE_ENV=test / FABRIC_TEST=1 启用 seam；否则忽略 env。启用时强制 isAbsolute 且拒绝 filesystem root。
context.notes: 测试 seam 在生产可一键旁路 allowlist，任意 .jsonl 可经 Stop hook 进入 digest/cite 管线。

resolution: fixed: FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS test-seam gated + refuse filesystem root `/`. Evidence: verification-fixloop + review SEC-001 RESOLVED.

issue_history.note: closed by ralph-v2 residual clearance + review fix-loop; evidence: .workflow/scratch/20260713-plan-residual-registered-036-041/verification.json, verification-fixloop.json, .workflow/scratch/20260713-review-P1-fixloop-042-045/review.json

title: [security] TOCTOU: allow 校验后用原始路径 readFileSync
description: isAllowed 对 realpath 做 root/size 校验，随后按原始 path 打开。窗口期内路径可被替换为 symlink。静态 symlink-to-outside 在当前实现下被 realpath 挡住，但 check-then-use 窗口仍在。
fix_direction: open+fstat / 仅读 realpath 结果；O_NOFOLLOW 或 lstat 拒绝 symlink；size 以 fd fstat 为准。

context.suggested_fix: open+fstat / 仅读 realpath 结果；O_NOFOLLOW 或 lstat 拒绝 symlink；size 以 fd fstat 为准。
context.notes: 本地可写 allowlisted 目录时可竞态劫持读取内容进入 digest。

resolution: fixed: summarizeTranscript reads validated realpath only (no TOCTOU original path). Evidence: verification-fixloop + review SEC-002 RESOLVED.

issue_history.note: closed by ralph-v2 residual clearance + review fix-loop; evidence: .workflow/scratch/20260713-plan-residual-registered-036-041/verification.json, verification-fixloop.json, .workflow/scratch/20260713-review-P1-fixloop-042-045/review.json

title: [security] Consumer hook trees lag monorepo templates after modular extract
description: packages/cli/templates/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs is ~1054 LOC after modular extract, but packages/cli/.claude/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs and packages/cli/.codex/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs remain ~2650 LOC monorepo copies. Dogfood/install-from-repo-path can run stale sandbox/ledger/watermark behavior even after source fixes land.
fix_direction: Regenerate installed mirrors from templates on install/doctor --fix; add doctor drift lint on LOC/hash of fabric-hint + lib/* between templates and .claude/.codex mirrors; document that templates are SSOT.

context.suggested_fix: Regenerate installed mirrors from templates on install/doctor --fix; add doctor drift lint on LOC/hash of fabric-hint + lib/* between templates and .claude/.codex mirrors; document that templates are SSOT.

feedback.note: local .claude/.codex mirrors resynced from templates (gitignored); templates SSOT

title: [reliability] Archive value-gate fail returns silent without status fallback
description: When decide() returns archive but D6 hasHighValueArchiveSignal fails, fabric-hint returns without emitSoftSignal and without falling through to emitSessionStatus. Combined with default silent human channel, Stop can compute archive signal then produce zero human feedback.
fix_direction: On value-gate fail, fall through to no-signal emitSessionStatus; optionally emit metrics/ledger reason for suppressed archive.

context.suggested_fix: On value-gate fail, fall through to no-signal emitSessionStatus; optionally emit metrics/ledger reason for suppressed archive.

feedback.note: value-gate fail falls through to emitSessionStatus

title: [ux] Default install scaffolds nudge_mode=silent with no post-install disclosure
description: writeDefaultFabricConfig scaffolds nudge_mode:"silent". Human Stop/SessionStart systemMessage and emitSessionStatus stay quiet; AI injection may still run. Install footer does not explain human breadcrumbs are muted, so users conclude Fabric does nothing after successful install.
fix_direction: Disclose mute default in install next-steps; or ship minimal/normal for human trust-anchor once per session; document FABRIC_NUDGE_MODE override.

context.suggested_fix: Disclose mute default in install next-steps; or ship minimal/normal for human trust-anchor once per session; document FABRIC_NUDGE_MODE override.

feedback.note: scaffold nudge_mode minimal + install footer disclosure

title: [ux] Maintenance CTA still advertises non-existent `fabric doctor --lint`
description: banner-i18n maintenanceLine2 and tests protect token `fabric doctor --lint`, but doctor public surface is --fix/--json/--verbose/--probe (lint-style telemetry moved to fabric audit). Following CTA confuses or fails.
fix_direction: Retarget CTA to `fabric doctor` and/or `fabric audit`; update protected-token tests.

context.suggested_fix: Retarget CTA to `fabric doctor` and/or `fabric audit`; update protected-token tests.

feedback.note: maintenance CTA retargeted to fabric doctor

title: [ux] Doctor store diagnostics never affect exit code
description: collectStoreDiagnostics is best-effort and never changes doctor exit semantics. active_personal_invalid can be severity error in store diagnostics while process.exitCode stays 0 based only on main DoctorReport — CI green despite real misroute risk.
fix_direction: Fold store error severity into exit code; or promote pointer integrity into main doctor checks under --strict.

context.suggested_fix: Fold store error severity into exit code; or promote pointer integrity into main doctor checks under --strict.

feedback.note: store diagnostics severity=error affects exit code

title: [ux] Doctor first-hit mapping mislabels hooks_missing and drops unbound codes
description: doctor-checks maps hit.code hooks_missing to diagnostic code first_hit_unbound while message is hooks-missing — code/meaning disagree. Actual first-hit failures unbound/no_write_target/no_match/project_unsealed are incomplete in assessFirstHitSync branch, so default doctor looks cleaner than fabric first-hit.
fix_direction: Map each first-hit code 1:1; raise mounted-but-unbound from info to warn when read-set empty.

context.suggested_fix: Map each first-hit code 1:1; raise mounted-but-unbound from info to warn when read-set empty.

feedback.note: first-hit codes mapped 1:1 including hooks_missing

title: [ux] archive_backlog telemetry collapses to signal_type other
description: STOP_EMIT_SIGNALS includes archive_backlog but SIGNAL_TYPE_ENUM is archive|review|maintenance|other, so backlog fires ledger as other and analytics under-count the Stop human-facing family.
fix_direction: Add archive_backlog to SIGNAL_TYPE_ENUM or map intentionally to archive with distinct field.

context.suggested_fix: Add archive_backlog to SIGNAL_TYPE_ENUM or map intentionally to archive with distinct field.

feedback.note: SIGNAL_TYPE_ENUM includes archive_backlog

title: [a11y] Flat status markers are glyph-only (✓/○/✗) without text roles
description: theme.symbol() keeps [ok]/[warn]/[error] under NO_COLOR, but flat-design command surfaces emit bare unicode glyphs. Under monochrome/NO_COLOR or screen-reader capture, pass/warn/fail is not self-describing.
fix_direction: Route all status prefixes through text-role primitive; glyph optional accent only when unicode/color enabled.

context.suggested_fix: Route all status prefixes through text-role primitive; glyph optional accent only when unicode/color enabled.

feedback.note: doctor/install status text-role prefixes

title: [a11y] Install step rows convey status only via glyph column
description: buildStepLine renders name + glyph with no status word. NO_COLOR snapshots show lines like `● Hooks ○` without skipped/failed text on the step itself.
fix_direction: Append localized status text after glyph; keep displayWidth alignment.

context.suggested_fix: Append localized status text after glyph; keep displayWidth alignment.

feedback.note: install step lines include [ok]/[skip]/[error] roles

title: [reliability] knowledge-hint-broad empty catch swallows errors
description: knowledge-hint-broad.cjs contains bare `catch {}` which swallows failures without diagnostic, making SessionStart broad path hard to debug when injection/snapshot fails.
fix_direction: At minimum log one stderr diagnostic line (like stop-stdin malformed input) before swallow; never empty catch on paths that affect user-visible injection.

context.suggested_fix: At minimum log one stderr diagnostic line (like stop-stdin malformed input) before swallow; never empty catch on paths that affect user-visible injection.

feedback.note: empty catch now logs stderr diagnostic

title: [architecture] knowledge-hint-narrow/broad still god-module scale
description: knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs ~1835 LOC and knowledge-hint-broad.cjs ~1548 LOC dwarf the modularized fabric-hint. SessionStart/PreToolUse surfaces remain hard to change safely.
fix_direction: Apply same extract pattern as fabric-hint: config, render, snapshot, path-normalize modules; keep facade exports stable for tests.

context.suggested_fix: Apply same extract pattern as fabric-hint: config, render, snapshot, path-normalize modules; keep facade exports stable for tests.

feedback.note: extracted tool-path-extract + hint-narrow-config + hint-summary-format; narrow 1835→1700

title: [architecture] doctor.ts remains ~1968 LOC multi-concern module
description: doctor.ts still concentrates many check families; related doctor-cite-coverage-core is another 1427 LOC. Maintainability and selective testing suffer.
fix_direction: Continue doctor-* module split; doctor.ts as assembly only; ensure CLI doctor surface maps to modules.

context.suggested_fix: Continue doctor-* module split; doctor.ts as assembly only; ensure CLI doctor surface maps to modules.

feedback.note: extracted doctor-frontmatter-helpers; doctor remains assembly-heavy but pure helpers sliced

title: [ux] Three conflicting nudge_mode defaults (scaffold/schema/runtime)
description: Scaffold writes silent; Zod fabric-config defaults missing field to normal; hook readNudgeMode falls back to normal while JSDoc mentions silent. Behavior depends on file presence/key presence/reader — operators cannot trust docs or partial configs.
fix_direction: Pick one SSOT default; align scaffold/schema/runtime/JSDoc/introspect; document upgrade for missing key.

context.suggested_fix: Pick one SSOT default; align scaffold/schema/runtime/JSDoc/introspect; document upgrade for missing key.

feedback.note: nudge-policy JSDoc aligned with scaffold minimal + schema normal missing-key

title: [ux] User-facing copy still points at legacy fabric.config.json
description: Project SSOT is .fabric/fabric-config.json (legacy root migrated). Some install/config i18n still tells users to edit fabric.config.json so changes never apply.
fix_direction: Replace remaining user-facing fabric.config.json with .fabric/fabric-config.json; keep migration docs only for legacy name.

context.suggested_fix: Replace remaining user-facing fabric.config.json with .fabric/fabric-config.json; keep migration docs only for legacy name.

feedback.note: user-facing i18n points to .fabric/fabric-config.json

title: [a11y] Doctor overall health badge is glyph-only on title line
description: renderDoctorHeader appends only renderStatus glyph to title; aggregate health lacks text role under NO_COLOR.
fix_direction: Render text-first badge ([warn]/ok/error) with optional glyph.

context.suggested_fix: Render text-first badge ([warn]/ok/error) with optional glyph.

feedback.note: doctor renderStatus already text-role from 065 fix

title: [performance] Stop-hook readLedger still full-file sync read of events.jsonl
description: Correctness requires full-file read for fabric-hint signals, but every Stop still does readFileSync of entire events.jsonl. Large multi-window ledgers make Stop latency grow unbounded (O(file size)) despite 256KB tail helper existing for intentional bounded readers.
fix_direction: Keep full-read semantics for signal correctness but add optional index/watermark sidecar for incremental scan, or mmap/streaming parse with checkpoint; document growth guidance + rotation.

context.suggested_fix: Keep full-read semantics for signal correctness but add optional index/watermark sidecar for incremental scan, or mmap/streaming parse with checkpoint; document growth guidance + rotation.

feedback.note: ledger-scan process-local mtime+size cache + >10MB stderr warn; full-file semantics preserved

title: [architecture] review-write-actions.ts ~995 LOC secondary concentration
description: After review.ts facade thin, review-write-actions.ts holds ~995 LOC of write actions — debt relocated more than fully decomposed.
fix_direction: Slice approve/reject/modify/defer/retire into focused modules; keep shared validation in review-shared.

context.suggested_fix: Slice approve/reject/modify/defer/retire into focused modules; keep shared validation in review-shared.

feedback.note: review-write-shared + review-write-modify-helpers extracted; actions 995→863 LOC

title: [scalability] Multi-window ledger growth has no first-class events.jsonl retention UX
description: Metrics ledger has rotation/purge helpers; events.jsonl is the primary multi-session truth and grows with every Stop/edit. Without user-facing retention guidance + enforced rotation, multi-window dogfood degrades Stop latency and disk over weeks.
fix_direction: Expose events retention policy in fabric-config + doctor warn when events.jsonl exceeds size/age; reuse rotateEventLedgerIfNeeded path in install/doctor --fix with safe archive naming.

context.location: packages/server/src/services/metrics.ts (rotation exists); events.jsonl consumers in hooks/server
context.suggested_fix: Expose events retention policy in fabric-config + doctor warn when events.jsonl exceeds size/age; reuse rotateEventLedgerIfNeeded path in install/doctor --fix with safe archive naming.

feedback.note: scaffold fabric_event_retention_days=30; doctor remediation documents config+doctor --fix rotation

title: [compliance] events.jsonl audit trail lacks user-facing retention policy parity with metrics
description: metrics has rotate/purge helpers; primary audit trail events.jsonl growth/retention is less productized for operators, risking unbounded PII-adjacent operational logs (paths, session ids, cite events).
fix_direction: Ship config knobs + doctor lint for events size/age; safe archive rotation with preserved history naming.

context.suggested_fix: Ship config knobs + doctor lint for events size/age; safe archive rotation with preserved history naming.

feedback.note: same productization path as 056 (retention knob + doctor UX parity with metrics rotation story)

title: [security] FABRIC_PROJECT_ROOT / FABRIC_HOME env can redirect MCP project root without path allowlist
description: Server resolves projectRoot from process.env.FABRIC_PROJECT_ROOT ?? cwd and hooks/banner use FABRIC_HOME for global roots. A compromised env or mis-set variable can redirect knowledge/store reads/writes to unexpected trees without realpath allowlist comparable to transcript sandbox.
fix_direction: Document trusted-env contract; optionally realpath+allowlist FABRIC_PROJECT_ROOT under git root / known homes; doctor warn on unusual overrides.

context.suggested_fix: Document trusted-env contract; optionally realpath+allowlist FABRIC_PROJECT_ROOT under git root / known homes; doctor warn on unusual overrides.

feedback.note: FABRIC_PROJECT_ROOT/CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR realpath+absolute normalize; refuse filesystem root; index uses resolveProjectRoot

title: [performance] doctor + cite-coverage remain multi-thousand-LOC hot paths
description: doctor.ts ~1968 LOC and doctor-cite-coverage-core.ts ~1427 LOC run heavy scans; repeated doctor/CI invocations re-walk large surfaces without clear incremental caching beyond existing pieces.
fix_direction: Split doctor into check modules with selective --probe subsets as default CI path; cache expensive cite-coverage aggregates with content hash.

context.suggested_fix: Split doctor into check modules with selective --probe subsets as default CI path; cache expensive cite-coverage aggregates with content hash.

feedback.note: doctor --probe description steers CI to cheap readiness snapshot; full cite-coverage remains on-demand (existing modular doctor-* already split)

title: [architecture] fabric-hint residual orchestrator still ~1054 LOC
description: After ISS-040 and follow-on extracts, fabric-hint.cjs is ~1054 LOC. main() orchestration + CONSTANTS facade remain thick; further modularization incomplete relative to thin-orchestrator goal.
fix_direction: Extract main-flow stages (load-context / decide-thresholds / emit-pipeline) into lib modules; keep only require.main + re-exports in facade.

context.suggested_fix: Extract main-flow stages (load-context / decide-thresholds / emit-pipeline) into lib modules; keep only require.main + re-exports in facade.

feedback.note: extracted buildStopThresholds to lib/hint-thresholds.cjs; fabric-hint facade thinner

title: [scalability] Sync store-disk-reader walk bound may still dominate large stores
description: store-disk-reader has depth/entry bounds (ISS-028) but large knowledge corpora still force sync readdir walks on resolver paths; multi-store growth multiplies cost.
fix_direction: Prefer counters/snapshot indexes for hot paths; keep full walk for doctor only.

context.suggested_fix: Prefer counters/snapshot indexes for hot paths; keep full walk for doctor only.

feedback.note: documented counters-first hot path; tightened STORE_SCAN_MAX_ENTRIES 100k→50k fail-closed

title: [a11y] Warn amber truecolor low contrast on light terminals
description: warn palette #F1C40F is weak on white/near-white backgrounds; severity color washes out when it matters most. Color-only status worsens the issue.
fix_direction: Darken warn for light BG or dual-palette; pair with text labels.

context.suggested_fix: Darken warn for light BG or dual-palette; pair with text labels.

feedback.note: darkened warn truecolor 180,120,0 and 256-color 178 for light-terminal contrast; text roles already present

title: [compliance] Session digests may retain user message excerpts with only soft retention
description: session-digest-writer stores user_messages/edit_paths under .fabric/.cache/session-digests with soft 30d unlink-on-write. No hard guarantee if write path stops; digests can hold sensitive chat snippets for archive mining.
fix_direction: Document privacy posture; enforce purge on install/doctor; optional redact-aggressive mode; never store full transcripts in digests.

context.suggested_fix: Document privacy posture; enforce purge on install/doctor; optional redact-aggressive mode; never store full transcripts in digests.

feedback.note: documented privacy posture; exported purgeSessionDigestsBestEffort; write path still purges 30d soft retention + redaction
